title: B2B Barn Management: role model, owner dashboard, scheduling
summary: BarnDashboard/CreateLesson/LessonRoster ekranlari mevcut. UserRole domain modeli var. Rol-aware navigasyon ve self-onboard akisi eksik. Supabase user_profiles.role kolonu varligini researcher dogrulamali.

decisions.decision: Self-onboard: kullanici kendi BARN_OWNER rolunu secebilir
decisions.reason: Admin atama akisi karmasik, MVP icin self-serve yeterli
decisions.impact: BarnOnboardingScreen yeni dosya, user_profiles.role = BARN_OWNER yazilir

decisions.decision: Bottom nav: BARN_OWNER icin Barns tab'i Ahirim olarak rename
Multi-barn ve Trainer rol kapsam disi
decisions.reason: MVP tek ahir, tek owner; TRAINER ileride

openQuestions: user_profiles tablosunda role kolonu var mi? Tipi STRING mi ENUM mi?
AppNav.kt'de mevcut bottom nav nasil tanimli (icon + label)?
nextActions: researcher: UserRole model + AppNav bottom nav + user_profiles schema + BarnManagementRepository metotlari
android-feature: BarnOnboardingScreen + role-aware AppNav bottom nav
